creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Hi,

I agree that it's odd... so here you go:

$ uname -v
FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC

It's a poudriere build, and the last time I built it the tree was from nov 3, 2023.

Just in case, the related PR259213 has a patch from 2 days ago, which explicitly references the same OpenBSD patch I referred to, above. Not sure if that helps.

Let me know if you need more info
